goal: improve semantic recall without replacing heuristic retrieval
constraints: keep heuristic retrieval as the first-stage candidate selector
preserve evidence ids and ranking reasons
decisions: We decide to use embedding rerank only after heuristic candidate selection
We decide to compare retrieval modes with low result limits so ranking quality matters
todos: benchmark heuristic versus hybrid retrieval on semantic paraphrases
report retrieval mode metadata in benchmark outputs

Retrieval note:
When someone asks about the search stack, the answer should mention that lexical recall stays in front while semantic rerank only reorders the shortlist.
Status update: similarity-based rerank should help with paraphrased lookup requests
